# mcp-server — llms.txt
# AI-readable index of the HUMMBL MCP Server.
# Give Claude access to 120 validated mental models via Model Context Protocol. Last updated: 2026-06-14.
#
# Query API: LLMs can parse this file to understand MCP server capabilities
# Installation: npm install -g @hummbl/mcp-server
# Documentation: https://github.com/hummbl-dev/mcp-server
#
# mcp-server categories:
#   HUMMBL:MCP Model Context Protocol server for Base120 integration
#   HUMMBL:BASE120 120 mental models across 6 cognitive transformations
#   HUMMBL:COGNITION Structured reasoning and problem-solving

## Overview

HUMMBL MCP Server gives Claude access to 120 validated mental models organized across 6 cognitive transformations:
- P (Perspective): Change viewpoint to see problems differently
- IN (Inversion): Flip problem to find solution by avoiding failure
- CO (Composition): Combine elements to create emergent properties
- DE (Decomposition): Break down complexity into manageable components
- RE (Recursion): Apply patterns at multiple scales and iterations
- SY (Meta-Systems): Understand rules, patterns, and systems governing systems

## Installation

```bash
# Global installation (recommended)
npm install -g @hummbl/mcp-server

# Local installation
npm install @hummbl/mcp-server
```

## Usage

```bash
# Start MCP server
hummbl-mcp-server

# List available operators
hummbl-mcp-server list

# Get operator details
hummbl-mcp-server get P1
```

## MCP Integration

Add to Claude Desktop MCP configuration:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "hummbl": {
      "command": "hummbl-mcp-server"
    }
  }
}
```

## Available Operators

All 120 Base120 operators are available via MCP tools:
- Perspective (P): P1-P20
- Inversion (IN): IN1-IN20
- Composition (CO): CO1-CO20
- Decomposition (DE): DE1-DE20
- Recursion (RE): RE1-RE20
- Meta-Systems (SY): SY1-SY20
